office_does: The prosecuting attorney prosecutes crimes, advises county government, and represents the county in civil matters.
race_blurb: Chief criminal deputy Jennifer Zorn faces Michael Turner, whose approved dossier contains filing-level information only.

candidates.summary: Zorn is the chief criminal deputy prosecutor and has practiced in Washington since 2015.

experience.basis: Chief criminal deputy service and a decade-plus legal record support a strong institutional profile.

candidates.summary: Turner is a filed candidate without an identity-safe professional biography or detailed platform.
highlights: Official election material verifies his candidacy [S1].
